options.name: <model_timing_report_file>
options.description: Specifies the name of the interface timing model report file that will be generated with the interface timing characteristics of the loaded design

options.name: -hold
options.description: To write the paths corresponding to early analysis.

options.name: -inputs
options.description: Restricts the write_model_timing report to the input ports specified with this parameter

options.name: -nworst
options.description: Specifies the number of paths to be enumerated for each end point

options.name: -outputs
options.description: Restricts the write_model_timing report to the output ports specified with this parameter

options.name: -setup
options.description: To write the paths corresponding to late analysis.

options.name: -slew_propagation
options.description: Sets the slew propagation mode to use for dumping the timing characteristics of the design

options.name: -type
options.description: Determines whether to report arc delay values or the worst-slack values

options.name: -view
options.description: Specifies a view name. The report can be generated for a specifc view name
